pokemon:toucannon.name: Toucannon
pokemon:toucannon.summary: Within its beak, its internal gas ignites, explosively launching seeds with enough power to pulverize boulders.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Within its beak, its internal gas ignites, explosively launching seeds with enough power to pulverize boulders.
When it battles, its beak heats up. The temperature can easily exceed 212 degrees Fahrenheit, causing severe burns when it hits.
Known for forming harmonious couples, this Pokémon is brought to wedding ceremonies as a good luck charm.
They smack beaks with others of their kind to communicate. The strength and number of hits tell each other how they feel.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Within its beak, its internal gas ignites, explosively launching seeds with enough power to pulverize boulders.

pokemon:pikipek.name: Pikipek
pokemon:pikipek.summary: This Pokémon feeds on berries, whose leftover seeds become the ammunition for the attacks it fires off from its mouth.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon feeds on berries, whose leftover seeds become the ammunition for the attacks it fires off from its mouth.
It can peck at a rate of 16 times a second to drill holes in trees. It uses the holes for food storage and for nesting.
It may look spindly, but its neck muscles are heavy-duty. It can peck at a tree 16 times per second!
It pecks at trees with its hard beak. You can get some idea of its mood or condition from the rhythm of its pecking.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon feeds on berries, whose leftover seeds become the ammunition for the attacks it fires off from its mouth.

pokemon:trumbeak.name: Trumbeak
pokemon:trumbeak.summary: By bending its beak, it can produce a variety of calls and brand itself a noisy nuisance for its neighbors.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: By bending its beak, it can produce a variety of calls and brand itself a noisy nuisance for its neighbors.
It eats berries and stores their seeds in its beak. When it encounters enemies or prey, it fires off all the seeds in a burst.
From its mouth, it fires the seeds of berries it has eaten. The scattered seeds give rise to new plants.
It can bend the tip of its beak to produce over a hundred different cries at will.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: By bending its beak, it can produce a variety of calls and brand itself a noisy nuisance for its neighbors.
